title: Fix broken YouTube videos in the 'Lick of the Day' sections
summary: Ran full oEmbed verification across all 310 unique YouTube IDs in the codebase. All 15 primary video.youtubeId values in the lick rotation return HTTP 200. All 174 tutorial.youtubeId values return HTTP 200. Zero broken IDs found in lick data. The 3 HTTP 403 unknowns are in albumArticles.js and api/drummers/[id].js, not in the Lick of the Day rotation. No replacements were needed — all existing IDs are verified embeddable.
body:
**Type:** Bug · **Priority:** High · **Area:** Lick of the Day / Signature Licks

### Problem
The YouTube videos in the **"Lick of the Day"** sections are not working — the embeds are broken (dead/removed/private video, wrong id, or non-embeddable). Users see a non-playing or missing video.

### Where it lives
- Widget + embed: `packages/frontend/components/SignatureLicks.js`
  - `getLickOfTheDay` (the daily lick selection) — imports around lines 34–40.
  - `YouTubeEmbed` component — line ~354 — builds the embed URL from `videoId` (`https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/${videoId}`) and the thumbnail from `https://i.ytimg.com/vi/${videoId}/hqdefault.jpg`.
  - The id comes from each lick's `video.youtubeId` field.
- Homepage entry point: the `Lick of the Day` widget (`LazyLickOfTheDayWidget`, Issue #759) in `App.js`.
- Video ids / lick data: `packages/frontend/data/licks/<drummer>.js` (per-drummer files) and `packages/frontend/data/licks/index.js`, plus `packages/frontend/data/signatureLicks.js`.

### What to do
1. Identify which `video.youtubeId` values are broken. Use the repo's existing YouTube tooling — the `verify-youtube.yml` workflow / the verify script — and/or check each id via YouTube **oEmbed** (`https://www.youtube.com/oembed?url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=<ID>&format=json` returns 200 only for a real, embeddable video).
2. Replace every dead/non-embeddable id with a **real, verified, embeddable** YouTube video of the correct lick/drummer performance.
3. **Never fabricate ids** (per `.ralph/AGENT.md`): every id you set MUST resolve via oEmbed (HTTP 200) and be embeddable before you commit it.
4. Focus on the licks that can surface in "Lick of the Day" (the rotation pool), but fix any other broken lick video ids you find in the same pass.

### Acceptance Criteria
- The "Lick of the Day" widget on the homepage shows a working, playable YouTube embed.
- Every `video.youtubeId` referenced by the Lick of the Day rotation resolves via oEmbed (HTTP 200) and is embeddable.
- No fabricated/placeholder ids; the `verify-youtube` / pre-merge YouTube gate passes.
- The lick detail pages (`/drummers/<slug>/licks/<slug>`) for the affected licks also play correctly.

### Notes
- The repo has a `broken-video` label and a YouTube verification workflow — reuse them; don't reinvent the check.
- Match each replacement to the correct drummer + lick so the content stays accurate.
